title: T-006 — Drizzle schema: wo_material_reservations + planning_settings
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `wo_material_reservations` per §5.10 (revised v3.1 — RM root only) and `planning_settings` per §5.12 + §14.1. Reservations columns: id, tenant_id, wo_id FK, wo_material_id FK, lp_id (uuid), quantity, reservation_type enum ('hard_lock'|'soft_plan'), reserved_at, reserved_by, released_at NULL, released_by NULL, release_reason enum ('consumed'|'cancelled'|'wo_cancelled'|'admin_override'). Partial unique index `lp_active_reservation_unique` on (lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL.

planning_settings: 30+ columns per §14.1 including po_/to_/wo_ prefixes, default_intermediate_disposition, intermediate_cascade_max_depth, sequencing_enabled_default, d365_so_trigger_enabled, status_display JSONB, field_visibility JSONB. UNIQUE(tenant_id) on settings.

Generate migration `0006_planning_reservations_settings.sql`. RED test asserts partial-unique on (lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL.

pipeline_inputs.description: Reservations + planning_settings tables. Hard-lock partial-unique index is the load-bearing constraint.
pipeline_inputs.details: Insert guard V-PLAN-RES-005 (material_source='stock' check) is service-layer, not DB. CHECK constraint on planning_settings.intermediate_cascade_max_depth BETWEEN 1 AND 20 (V-PLAN-SET-002). status_display JSONB seeded via separate seed task T-029. Defaults per §14.1 (po_default_lead_time_days=7, wo_number_format='WIP-{SUFFIX}-{NNNNNNN}', default_intermediate_disposition='to_stock').
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema loads, when introspected, then both tables export expected columns including release_reason enum.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then partial-unique on (lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL exists.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/reservations.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then no errors.
test_strategy: RED test asserts partial-unique index on (lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL is present in generated SQL.
risk_red_lines: Do not weaken the partial-unique constraint — V-PLAN-RES-001 hard-lock relies on DB enforcement.
Do not add reservations for material_source='upstream_wo_output' — service layer must reject (V-PLAN-RES-005).
